title: Shallow 5-Why analysis stops at human action (depth 2)
code_snippet:
## Root Cause Analysis

Why did payment fail? -> Bad config was deployed
Why was bad config deployed? -> Engineer didn't test it

Root Cause: Engineer error — insufficient testing before deploy.
violated_rule: 5-Why analysis depth >= 3 — not stopping at superficial cause
expected_feedback: Standard: 5-Why analysis stops at depth 2 with 'engineer didn't test it' — this is blame, not root cause. Continue asking why: Why was untested config accepted by the pipeline? Why is there no validation gate? Root cause must reach a process or design gap, not a human action. Minimum depth is 3, typically 4-5.
coverage_rules: Stop when you reach a process or design decision
